notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher PJ Poulin picks off José Ramírez at 1st on throw to first baseman Luis García Jr.

notableEvents.label: Jacob Young GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Young grounds into a double play, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to second baseman Travis Bazzana to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Drew Millas out at 2nd. Jacob Young out at 1st.
